subcodes.first_line: And salutations and peace be upon Him through Whom the sun hath dawned from the horizon of Hijaz and the Vale hath spoken: "He is made manifest!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و الصلوه و السلام علی الذی به اشرقت الشمس من افق الحجاز و نطق البطحاء قد ظهر
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
